---
title: "About"
image: "images/DSC_0369copy.jpg"
description: |
  Welcome to the website. I hope you enjoy it!
site: distill::distill_website
output:
  postcards::trestles
---


I am currently a PhD student studying community ecology at Stanford University working with Dr. Fiorenza Micheli at the Hopkins Marine Station. *My main research interest is considering how communities are formed, maintained and  disassembled*. I'm especially interested how these dynamics vary over time and comparing across different ecosystems/contexts.
<br>  


PhD Biology Stanford University, Current  
MSc Biology University of Victoria, 2017  
BScH Biology Queen's University, 2013  
<br>  


Email: jmcirwin@stanford.edu  
Twitter: @jamiemcirwin  
[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ShneqswAAAAJ&hl=en)
